anchorization_class_identifiers.summary: Structures a companion lineage for cutover-sensitive receipt candidates while remaining shadow-only and non-promoting.
Structures a parallel evidence packet around a declared cutover-sensitive window without claiming live cutover completion.
Links candidate anchorization outputs back to upstream operator transaction receipts and continuity surfaces.
Structures bounded proof-bearing inputs, refusal posture, and reconstructability anchors for later review.
Preserves trust-relevant or revocation-relevant continuity cues while remaining strictly non-executing and non-promoting.
Preserves why a cutover-sensitive evidence path was blocked, refused, partial, or held for review.

evidence_class_identifiers.summary: Typed operator transaction receipts and continuity records that remain the baseline upstream evidence layer.
Cutover-sensitive receipt semantics already frozen upstream and consumed here as governing law.
Evidence that preserves how shadow or parallel anchors link across intent, assembly, refusal, review, and bounded result posture.
Evidence that records the bounded cutover-sensitive window and its explicit non-realization posture.
Evidence that records lifecycle, replay, snapshot, hotswap, or distributed-authority boundary relevance without claiming those boundaries are solved.
Evidence that preserves trust-relevant or revocation-relevant continuity linkage without executing trust or publication change.
Evidence that preserves why a candidate anchorization path did not become promotable or admissible.
Logs, traces, CI summaries, dashboards, mirror views, or bundle reports that may inform review but remain derived until reviewed explicitly.

review_posture_categories.summary: Evidence may be structured for review but not promoted into canonical live receipt meaning.
Evidence may accompany canonical receipts as a companion anchor set but may not replace them.
Any semantic promotion, reclassification, or canonicalization requires explicit FULL review.
Some promotions remain constitutionally outside this family and are forbidden even if pressure exists to widen scope.

reclassification_boundary_rules.summary: Promoting local traces, logs, CI summaries, mirror views, or other derived evidence into canonical receipt meaning requires FULL review.
Reinterpreting shadow or parallel anchorization as proof that a live receipt pipeline now exists requires FULL review and remains outside this family unless a later checkpoint explicitly admits it.
Any rebinding of provenance classifications, provenance event semantics, or anchor classes that changes canonical meaning requires FULL review.
Any attempt to let anchorization imply trust execution, revocation propagation realization, or publication execution requires FULL review and remains out of scope here.
Any attempt to let anchorization imply lawful cutover, authority handoff, state transfer, or distributed runtime convergence requires FULL review and remains out of scope here.
Treating shadow or parallel anchorization as a direct route to live operational authority is forbidden in this family.

operator_and_cutover_receipt: Ordinary operator transaction receipts remain the canonical baseline.
Generalized live-cutover receipt semantics remain the stronger upstream evidence law.
Anchorization may structure companion lineage and packet boundaries, but it does not mint a replacement receipt canon.
trust_and_revocation: Trust-aware or revocation-aware continuity cues may be preserved where they constrain receipt posture.
Anchorization must not claim live trust execution, live revocation propagation realization, trust-root promotion, or publication execution realization.
Trust roots remain empty and trust policy posture remains provisional.
runtime_and_distributed_authority: Anchorization may record runtime-boundary relevance and bounded cutover-sensitive references.
Anchorization must not claim lawful runtime cutover proof, authority movement, handoff legality, or distributed convergence.
Runtime boundary relevance may be anchored here, but runtime realization may not.
blocker_boundary: This family may operate while lawful runtime cutover proof, live receipt-pipeline realization, trust convergence, trust execution realization, and replication-transfer proof remain unresolved.
This family may reduce ambiguity and preserve reconstructability without renaming the blocker field as solved.

invalidity_failure_categories.summary: Shadow or parallel evidence was misrepresented as canonical live receipt truth.
Derived logs, traces, mirrors, or CI summaries were promoted without the required FULL review.
The anchorization packet cannot reconstruct how evidence linked across intent, assembly, refusal, review, and bounded result posture.
The supposed anchorization output is not reconnectable to the upstream operator transaction continuity layer.
The bounded cutover-sensitive window, scope, or non-realization posture is absent or ambiguous.
The anchorization claim exceeds current lifecycle, replay, snapshot, hotswap, or distributed-authority maturity.
Anchorization posture leaked into trust execution, revocation realization, or publication-execution meaning.
Mirror views, CI output, dashboards, or similar derived surfaces were treated as sufficient canonical evidence.
A blocked, refused, partial, or held-for-review anchorization path was rewritten as completed.
The shadow or parallel anchorization history cannot be reconstructed canonically.

canonical: canonical anchorization records where later doctrine explicitly defines them
explicit review decisions that approve or refuse reclassification

prohibited_scope_expansion_shapes: anchorization treated as live receipt-pipeline realization
shadow evidence treated as canonical receipt truth with no review
local logs traces CI summaries or mirror views treated as sufficient live-cutover evidence
trust-aware anchorization treated as trust execution realization
runtime-boundary references treated as lawful cutover proof
one harness one report format or one tool output becoming architectural canon
admitted later-wave scope used to smuggle in broader zeta realization claims

downstream_refinement_prompts.title: trust-aware refusal and containment remains reserve scope until later checkpoint law
live receipt-pipeline realization remains future work outside this family
